buildCommand: echo "SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL" > .env && echo "SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" >> .env && curl -s https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.32.1-stable.tar.xz | tar xJ -C /tmp && export PATH="/tmp/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter --version && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release
